questions.scenario: Cloud Run must connect to a Cloud SQL private IP. What must exist besides application code?

options.text: A VPC egress path from Cloud Run to the network that can reach the private database address.
A public URL for the database.
A load balancer frontend for every database query.

questions.explanation: Cloud Run needs an outbound VPC path for private IP destinations.

questions.scenario: A service sends only RFC 1918 private-address traffic through the VPC path and leaves public API calls on the normal outbound path. Which egress shape does that describe?
questions.explanation: Private-ranges-only egress focuses the VPC path on private address destinations.

questions.scenario: What should a team list before sending all Cloud Run traffic through a VPC path?

options.text: Google API dependencies such as Secret Manager.
Public third-party APIs that may now need NAT or egress design.

questions.explanation: All-traffic egress makes the VPC path responsible for every outbound destination.
